reviews.review_text:
$237.77 to complete my collection for a game made IN 2012! That is FOURTEEN years ago, closer to the date of the very beginning of this franchise in 2004 than today. I have barely played the base game in anticipation of being able to get the whole game one day at a reasonable. Nope... Paradox is central in my change of opinion about gaming as a whole. How can I have any respect for an industry that obviously has none of it for me? "Once we clean up torrents we will be able to offer games at a reasonable price," said the multi-million dollar companies I had sympathy for at that time, like this one. 2012 passed and so did torrents... what happened to the price of this and similar games? THEY GOT MORE EXPENSIVE!!!! Yeah, text book history lesson of factors that led to the Great Depression of monopoly companies with no accountability. 

On a positive note, the base game is now F2P.. the 1st one is always free.
phenomenal, i was catholic sunni and shia in 4 years. goat game

Truly a wonder of the modern age. It's got a legndary vibe powered by the setting and the soundtrack. It's got intrigue and excitement without being vulgar or gruesome, and it's just so interesting to play as a dynasty instead of as a person for the whole length of a game.
I can't condone Paradox's business practices and milking customers with endless addons.
You think I'm going to say something nice after 6,000 hours? How about you go ♥♥♥♥ yourself.
Still fun to play and not annoying enough to think for yourself: "♥♥♥♥ this game!"
Great game. Maybe one day I'll learn how to play :)
